obstacle_groups.label: Top tooth left — x=0..1, y=0..4, touches top and left edges
Top tooth mid-left — x=4..5, y=0..4, touches top
Top tooth mid-right — x=9..10, y=0..4, touches top
Top tooth right — x=13..14, y=0..4, touches top and right edges
Central obstacle — x=6..8, y=9..10; first obstacle in laser path
Bottom tooth left — x=0..1, y=15..19, touches bottom and left edges
Bottom tooth mid-left — x=4..5, y=15..19, touches bottom
Bottom tooth mid-right — x=9..10, y=15..19, touches bottom
Bottom tooth right — x=13..14, y=15..19, touches bottom and right edges
